title: the uncylopedia dramatica on eva
wikitext:
[]: the uncylopedia/dramatica on eva             Quote Post by TaintedHero » Wed Feb 09, 2011 12:24 am I found this randomly and thought it had to be one the funniest things I have ever seen. Words can barley describe it, just read the character descriptions. [url]http://uncyclopedia.wikia.com/wiki/Neon_Genesis_Evangelion[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Feb 09, 2011 2:05 am I guess it was kind of funny.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Feb 09, 2011 3:10 am Most critics complained that the film was too upbeat, and that its ending seemed forced and overly simple.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Wed Feb 09, 2011 12:13 pm I haven't laughed that hard in a while. Thanks for that.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Wed Feb 09, 2011 9:33 pm OMG! I was laughing my a*# off!!! The best part is that most of it it's true XD

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Thu Feb 10, 2011 1:28 pm the older version of it was funnier

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Thu Feb 10, 2011 1:32 pm GasmaskAvenger wrote: the older version of it was funnier

[]:             Quote Post by TaintedHero » Thu Feb 10, 2011 3:35 pm GasmaskAvenger wrote: the older version of it was funnier

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Thu Feb 10, 2011 6:20 pm You can.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu Feb 10, 2011 7:20 pm A link, perhaps?

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Feb 10, 2011 7:29 pm He's shown, all right... he's probably hidden in the skies. If I remember correctly, He's probably in every episode that has a blue sky in the background... you have to use 500 times zoom to see him. Happy finding!

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Thu Feb 10, 2011 7:31 pm tomrule123 wrote: How the hell did I miss this in NGE?!

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Feb 10, 2011 7:34 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: IT WAS NEVAH THERE!

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Feb 10, 2011 7:35 pm tomrule123 wrote: How the hell did I miss this in NGE?!

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Thu Feb 10, 2011 10:23 pm child of Lilith wrote: A link, perhaps?

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Fri Feb 11, 2011 12:42 am That sure give me a good laugh. I love the ending series part of the page. Is there a eva page on the Encyclopedia Dramatica?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Feb 11, 2011 3:05 am Meh. Not very funny IMO. At least it's not ED :bigguns:

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Fri Feb 11, 2011 3:08 am TehDonutKing wrote: Just click on history at the top of the page. It allows you to see every version of the article.

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Fri Feb 11, 2011 6:45 am Most of it was kinda meh but I liked this: Horaki Hikari: As name implies, she is both a whore and a hick.

[]:             Quote Post by xuefranklin » Fri Feb 11, 2011 8:00 am Wow...LCL=Tang...
